expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: defect feedback loop injects scenarios from prior defects into next feature QA plan
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the opposite: "The snapshot evidence also does not specify a mechanism where a defect feedback loop injects scenarios from prior defects into the next feature QA plan" and "What is missing in evidence: Any contract text that says defects ... are mined to create new scenarios and automatically carried into subsequent plans."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase8
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md and result.md both report phase8 is not present: "Observed only phases 0–7; no phase8 present." and "does not define any Phase 8 (only Phases 0–7 exist in the contract)." Therefore the output cannot align to phase8.
